command: rg -n --json 'controller_call|controller execution|controller request|controller action|adapter call|route activation|route_activation|activate route|runtime invocation|private-agent invocation|actual dispatch|runtime dispatch|runtime_dispatch|workpacket execution|workpacket_execution|execute workpacket|production_ready|production ready|production readiness|final_pass|delivery_complete|delivery completion|please dispatch|dispatch execution|perform dispatch|execute dispatch' nexus/governance -g '*.py'

allowed_guard_literals.line: return _no_go("human decision cannot claim completion, production readiness, dispatch, or execution")
return _no_go("deliverable evaluation cannot claim completion, production readiness, dispatch, or execution")
return _no_go("review disposition cannot claim completion, production readiness, dispatch, or execution")
blocked_reasons=("handoff candidate expected_outputs cannot request runtime dispatch",),
"Dispatch Contract command expected_outputs cannot request runtime dispatch",
return any(value == "runtime dispatch" for value in _normalized_expected_output_values(expected_outputs))

allowed_negative_test_fixtures.line: assert result.message == "Dispatch Contract command expected_outputs cannot request runtime dispatch"
("notes", "this would require runtime invocation by a private agent"),
("decision_question", "Can the reviewer approve production readiness after this check?"),
